name: ui-skills
description: A Codex UI craft plugin combining design direction, searchable UI references, accessibility, motion performance, and polish rules.

interface.shortDescription: Design, build, review, and polish frontend UI with strong taste and hard checks.
interface.longDescription: Combines the best parts of several UI skill families into a Codex-ready plugin: Impeccable-style product/brand register, UI/UX Pro Max searchable references, User Interface Wiki heuristics, make-interfaces-feel-better detail polish, ui-skills accessibility and motion guardrails, and selective anti-template guidance from Taste and 0xdesign.
defaultPrompt: Redesign this screen with stronger hierarchy.
Audit this UI for accessibility and polish.
